<svg width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><rect width="512" height="512" fill="#87CEEB"/><rect y="400" width="512" height="112" fill="#228B22"/><g transform="translate(80, 420)"><rect x="-15" y="-60" width="30" height="60" fill="#5D4037"/><polygon points="0,-180 -60,-60 60,-60" fill="#006400"/><polygon points="0,-220 -50,-110 50,-110" fill="#006400"/></g><g transform="translate(200, 440)"><rect x="-15" y="-60" width="30" height="60" fill="#5D4037"/><polygon points="0,-160 -55,-50 55,-50" fill="#2E7D32"/><polygon points="0,-200 -45,-100 45,-100" fill="#2E7D32"/></g><g transform="translate(320, 410)"><rect x="-15" y="-60" width="30" height="60" fill="#5D4037"/><polygon points="0,-190 -65,-70 65,-70" fill="#1B5E20"/><polygon points="0,-230 -55,-120 55,-120" fill="#1B5E20"/></g><g transform="translate(440, 430)"><rect x="-15" y="-60" width="30" height="60" fill="#5D4037"/><polygon points="0,-170 -60,-60 60,-60" fill="#228B22"/><polygon points="0,-210 -50,-110 50,-110" fill="#228B22"/></g><g transform="translate(140, 460)"><rect x="-10" y="-40" width="20" height="40" fill="#5D4037"/><polygon points="0,-120 -40,-40 40,-40" fill="#388E3C"/></g><g transform="translate(380, 470)"><rect x="-10" y="-40" width="20" height="40" fill="#5D4037"/><polygon points="0,-120 -40,-40 40,-40" fill="#43A047"/></g></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Person on the left (whispering) -->
  <circle cx="180" cy="180" r="40" fill="#333" />
  <path d="M180 230 Q180 350 100 350 L260 350 Q180 350 180 230" fill="#333" />
  
  <!-- Hand cupping mouth -->
  <path d="M210 180 Q230 180 235 210" stroke="#333" stroke-width="8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" />

  <!-- Person on the right (listening) -->
  <circle cx="332" cy="180" r="40" fill="#666" />
  <path d="M332 230 Q332 350 252 350 L412 350 Q332 350 332 230" fill="#666" />
  
  <!-- Ear of the listener -->
  <path d="M292 170 Q280 170 280 185 Q280 200 292 200" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4" fill="none" />

  <!-- Air/Sound dashes -->
  <line x1="230" y1="195" x2="260" y2="195" stroke="#999" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="5,5" />
  <line x1="235" y1="185" x2="265" y2="185" stroke="#999" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="5,5" />
  <line x1="235" y1="205" x2="265" y2="205" stroke="#999" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="5,5" />
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512"><circle cx="256" cy="256" r="200" fill="#FFD700" stroke="#000" stroke-width="5"/><ellipse cx="180" cy="200" rx="25" ry="35" fill="#fff" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="180" cy="210" r="8" fill="#000"/><ellipse cx="332" cy="200" rx="25" ry="35" fill="#fff" stroke="#000" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="332" cy="210" r="8" fill="#000"/><path d="M150 140 Q180 120 210 145" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M302 145 Q332 120 362 140" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="4"/><path d="M180 340 L200 320 L220 340 L240 320 L260 340 L280 320 L300 340 L320 320 L340 340" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M100 256 Q80 240 60 256 Q40 270 60 280" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M412 256 Q432 240 452 256 Q472 270 452 280" fill="none" stroke="#000" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.6"/><circle cx="140" cy="380" r="10" fill="#ADD8E6" opacity="0.8"/><circle cx="370" cy="380" r="10" fill="#ADD8E6" opacity="0.8"/></svg>

<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512' width='512' height='512'><path d='M256 50 L320 150 L320 350 L192 350 L192 150 Z' fill='#cccccc' stroke='#333' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M256 50 C256 50 320 100 320 180 L192 180 C192 100 256 50 256 50' fill='#ff4444' stroke='#333' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M192 280 L140 380 L192 380 Z' fill='#ff4444' stroke='#333' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M320 280 L372 380 L320 380 Z' fill='#ff4444' stroke='#333' stroke-width='4'/><circle cx='256' cy='230' r='25' fill='#88ccff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M210 350 L200 420 L312 420 L302 350' fill='#555'/><path d='M220 420 L200 480 L256 500 L312 480 L292 420' fill='#ffaa00'><animate attributeName='fill' values='#ffaa00;#ff4400;#ffaa00' dur='0.2s' repeatCount='indefinite'/></path></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Background Ground -->
  <rect x="0" y="400" width="512" height="112" fill="#8B4513" />
  
  <!-- Wheat Stalks -->
  <g stroke="#DAA520" stroke-width="4" fill="none">
    <path d="M100,400 Q110,300 100,200" />
    <path d="M120,400 Q130,310 120,220" />
    <path d="M140,400 Q150,320 140,240" />
    <path d="M80,400 Q90,310 80,220" />
  </g>
  <g fill="#FFD700">
    <ellipse cx="100" cy="190" rx="8" ry="12" transform="rotate(-10, 100, 190)" />
    <ellipse cx="100" cy="170" rx="8" ry="12" transform="rotate(10, 100, 170)" />
    <ellipse cx="120" cy="210" rx="8" ry="12" />
    <ellipse cx="80" cy="210" rx="8" ry="12" />
  </g>

  <!-- Wicker Basket -->
  <path d="M250,350 L450,350 L430,450 L270,450 Z" fill="#CD853F" stroke="#8B4513" stroke-width="3" />
  <path d="M250,350 Q350,320 450,350" fill="none" stroke="#8B4513" stroke-width="5" />
  
  <!-- Harvested Corn/Produce in Basket -->
  <ellipse cx="300" cy="340" rx="25" ry="40" fill="#FFFF00" stroke="#DAA520" />
  <ellipse cx="350" cy="330" rx="25" ry="40" fill="#FFFF00" stroke="#DAA520" />
  <ellipse cx="400" cy="340" rx="25" ry="40" fill="#FFFF00" stroke="#DAA520" />

  <!-- Scythe -->
  <g transform="translate(180, 150) rotate(-20)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="10" height="300" fill="#5D4037" />
    <path d="M10,0 Q150,20 180,120 L160,120 Q130,40 10,30 Z" fill="#B0BEC5" stroke="#455A64" />
  </g>
</svg>

<svg width='512' height='512' viewBox='0 0 512 512' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='512' height='512' fill='#000'/><defs><radialGradient id='grad1' cx='50%' cy='50%' r='50%' fx='50%' fy='50%'><stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:#fff;stop-opacity:1' /><stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:#ff00ff;stop-opacity:0' /></radialGradient></defs><circle cx='256' cy='256' r='200' fill='url(#grad1)' opacity='0.8'/><path d='M256 50 L280 200 L450 220 L310 300 L380 460 L256 350 L132 460 L202 300 L62 220 L232 200 Z' fill='#ffff00' stroke='#ff0000' stroke-width='8'/><circle cx='120' cy='120' r='60' fill='#00ffff' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='400' cy='120' r='70' fill='#ff00ff' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='100' cy='400' r='80' fill='#00ff00' opacity='0.7'/><circle cx='420' cy='420' r='50' fill='#ff8000' opacity='0.7'/><line x1='0' y1='0' x2='512' y2='512' stroke='#ffffff' stroke-width='2' opacity='0.3'/><line x1='512' y1='0' x2='0' y2='512' stroke='#ffffff' stroke-width='2' opacity='0.3'/></svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Foundation/Ground -->
  <rect x="50" y="450" width="412" height="20" fill="#555" />
  
  <!-- Brick Wall in progress -->
  <rect x="100" y="400" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  <rect x="205" y="400" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  <rect x="310" y="400" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <rect x="152" y="350" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  <rect x="257" y="350" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" />
  
  <!-- Crane Structure -->
  <rect x="380" y="100" width="20" height="350" fill="#FFD700" />
  <rect x="150" y="100" width="300" height="15" fill="#FFD700" />
  
  <!-- Crane Hook and Cable -->
  <line x1="200" y1="115" x2="200" y2="250" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />
  <path d="M190 250 Q200 270 210 250" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="4" />
  
  <!-- Brick being lowered -->
  <rect x="150" y="260" width="100" height="50" fill="#B22222" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.8" />
  
  <!-- Trowel -->
  <path d="M80 380 L120 380 L100 340 Z" fill="#AAA" stroke="#333" />
  <rect x="95" y="380" width="10" height="20" fill="#8B4513" />
</svg>
